133.reason: [When a single '&' is encountered, an error is correctly added, but tokenType is still set to AND, which will cause an invalid token to be added to the tokens list instead of only reporting the error.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [When a single '&' is encountered, an error is correctly added, but tokenType is still set to AND, which will cause an invalid token to be added to the tokens list instead of only reporting the error.]

144.reason: [Same issue as above: for a single '|', an error is recorded, but tokenType is still set to OR, leading to an incorrect token being generated instead of skipping token creation.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue as above: for a single '|', an error is recorded, but tokenType is still set to OR, leading to an incorrect token being generated instead of skipping token creation.]
